headline: Stocks pare losses as oil falls back below $100; Dow is down 300 points: Live updates
summary: The Dow recorded its worst week since President Trump unveiled his tariff policy in April.

headline: Inflation and Labor Data, Oracle, Hewlett Packard, Adobe, and More to Watch This Week
summary: This week’s economic data will shine a light on consumer prices, jobs and turnover, and small business optimism. Dollar General, Casey’s, are among a relative handful of companies that will report earnings.
